- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input

- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

repository.name: edgenode
repository.description: Holochain Edge Nodes for running decentralized hApps

commit.message:
Rewrite calendar touch drag using document-level listeners

Previous approach attached touchmove to the grid div via ref, which is
unreliable on mobile because touchmove events may not bubble consistently.
New approach attaches to document directly with { passive: false } so
e.preventDefault() always works to stop page scroll.

All drag state uses refs (touchDragRef, touchOverDayRef, touchMovedRef,
rescheduleRef, monthRef, yearRef) so the document listeners never capture
stale closures across re-renders. touchend is also on document so it
fires reliably regardless of where the finger lifts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  Turbopack from resolving the subpath at build time
- Use dynamic import() with variable for jose to avoid module-not-found
- Both modules are server-only and resolved at runtime

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Reorganize into apps/ folder, add nightshade app

- Move rocketship (IBM warehouse onboarding) into apps/rocketship/
- Add apps/nightshade/ — Agentic SDLC executive briefing app
- Each app has its own Dockerfile, nginx.conf, and index.html

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use soft reload for layout-only settings to prevent white flash

Settings that only change keyboard layout data (number row, hints,
popup keys, language switch, etc.) were using setThemeNeedsReload()
which destroys and recreates the entire input view via hideWindow/
showWindow. This caused a white flash and keyboard disappearance.

Switch 19 call sites across 10 files to use reloadKeyboard() instead,
which rebuilds the keyboard layout on the existing view without any
hide/show cycle. Theme-affecting settings (colors, borders, fonts,
background images) still use setThemeNeedsReload() as they require
a full ContextThemeWrapper rebuild.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: SSE chat streaming drops events across chunk boundaries (#46)

* fix: hoist SSE currentEvent variable to persist across stream chunks

The variable was re-declared inside the while loop, causing it to
reset on each read() call. When event: and data: lines arrived in
separate TCP chunks, the data line was silently dropped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  streaming events
- Replace broken `msg.type === 'tool_call'` (non-existent SDK type)
  with correct `stream_event` handling for `content_block_start` (tool
  use) and `content_block_delta` (text tokens)
- Add `text_delta` event type to stream tokens to the frontend
- Update AiChat.vue to render text incrementally in the message bubble
  instead of waiting for the full response
- Show loading dots only before text starts flowing; display tool
  status below the streaming message

commit.message:
Gen 9.21: Zynq-7020 vortex CL, 100K word Bible expansion, voice fix

Zynq-7020 Target (new):
- bhml_table.v: BHML physics table (10x10, 28-harmony, tropical successor)
- vortex_cl.v: 3-body vortex operator (prev x curr x next) in 2 clock cycles
- chain_walker.v: Hardware lattice chain walk engine (max depth 16)
- gait_vortex.v: 4-leg torus gait controller with self-healing
- ck_top_zynq7020.v: Top-level integrating all modules (~4700 LUTs, 8.8% of Zynq)
- tsml_table.v: Standalone TSML for vortex pipeline reuse
- Build script + README with full architecture documentation

Voice Quality Fix:
- Fixed template-operator mismatch in fractal voice (compose_tribal)
- Added TEMPLATES_1 for single-operator responses
- Fixed _fill_template to blend triads instead of silent reuse
- Raised min operator count from 1 to 3 (RED band floor)
- Raised stage voice floor to 3 across all development stages

100K Word Vocabulary Expansion:
- ck_word_expansion.py: Bible (4300 words) + English (2700) + Science (675)
  + Spiritual (500) + Emotion (264) + Domain (1660) + morphological
  derivation (~36K) + cross-derivation (~60K) = ~100K total words
- Every word gets genuine 15D triadic signature from Hebrew root forces
- Auto-POS detection via suffix rules
- Bible words tagged as STRUCTURE lens (scripture = truth)
- Wired into engine startup (runs after fractal voice init)

Clay Institute:
- gap_bridge_analysis.py: Cross-gap dependency matrix (1170 lines)
- lemma_BRIDGE_v2.tex: Bridge lemmas for P-H-3, YM-3, MC-3 (810 lines)
- P8 Unification Book v2.0: Gap attack campaign integrated (Ch 4, 10, 11)

commit.message:
fix: align CodexBridge with official Codex app-server JSON-RPC protocol

Based on codex app-server generate-json-schema output:
- error notification: extract error.message + codexErrorInfo, respect willRetry
- turn/completed: use correct TurnStatus enum (completed/interrupted/failed/inProgress)
- item/completed: agentMessage type uses "text" field (not "content")
- ExtractContentBlocks: check "text" first (agentMessage), then "content" fallback
- Handle codex/event/* internal events (mcp_startup_complete, task_started, etc.)
- Log full params for unhandled notifications to aid debugging

commit.message:
fix(stability): 3 bugs found in log analysis

fix(migrate): rowCount is null for SELECT in node-postgres — use rows.length
  Migration runner was re-running migration 001 on every restart, logging
  "relation users already exists" on each boot. Server continued but the
  error polluted logs and indicated a real code bug.

fix(directory): skip CF DNS creation silently when credentials/VPS_IP missing
  setImmediate was calling cfRequest without checking credentials first,
  logging 4 stack traces per registration attempt. Now warns once and
  activates the instance directly without a DNS record.

perf(migration 027): add partial indexes for reply_to_id and pinned_message_id
  reply_to_id used in LEFT JOIN when loading channel history.
  pinned_message_id used at channel join to fetch pinned message.
  Both are sparse columns — partial indexes (WHERE NOT NULL) keep them lean.

commit.message:
Fix: Add comprehensive error handling for Supabase API routes

CRITICAL FIX for production 500 errors:
- Add Supabase environment variable validation
- Enhanced error logging with detailed error messages
- Better error responses for debugging

CHANGES:
- app/api/submissions/save/route.ts: Validate env vars before DB operations
- app/api/submissions/contact/save/route.ts: Same validation
- app/api/newsletter/subscribe/route.ts: Same validation

ERROR HANDLING:
- Check NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL exists
- Check NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY exists
- Return clear error messages for debugging
- Log full error details to console
- Return error.message in response for troubleshooting

This ensures proper error messages when:
- Supabase env vars not set in production
- Database connection issues
- Table/column mismatches
- Permission problems

whose estimated feature-map cost is ~24.6B (~7.3x the old 112x128x160 patches).

fix: shortcut disable toggle now actually disables shortcuts

The frontend stores disabled shortcuts as camelCase names like
"showScreenpipeShortcut" but the Rust side checked for snake_case
keys like "show". The strings never matched so is_disabled() always
returned false — toggling a shortcut off in settings had no effect.

commit.message:
feat: add `pv query` — BM25 semantic search across contracts (Refs PMAT-065)

Query engine with three search modes:
- Semantic (BM25 ranking over contract corpus)
- Regex (pattern match across all string fields)
- Literal (exact substring match, case-insensitive)

Filters: --obligation, --depends-on, --depended-by, --unproven
Enrichment: --score, --graph, --paper
Output: text (default) and JSON

Includes:
- ContractIndex with inverted indexes for O(1) stem/equation/obligation lookup
- 16 unit tests in library, 3 dispatch tests in CLI
- `cargo run --example query` for quick demo
- Extracted dispatch tests to separate file (main.rs under 500 lines)

Also fixes:
- classifier-pipeline-v1.yaml: added missing qa_gate.id and kani_harnesses
